entries.title: Released GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano
entries.summary: Released GPT-5.4 mini and GPT-5.4 nano to the Chat Completions and Responses API. mini is designed for efficiency in high-volume workloads, while nano is optimized for simple tasks where speed and cost are critical.

entries.title: Updated gpt-5.3-chat-latest
entries.summary: Updated the gpt-5.3-chat-latest slug to point to the latest model version currently used in ChatGPT.

entries.title: Fixed image encoder bug in GPT-5.4
entries.summary: Updated the image encoder to fix a bug with input_image inputs in GPT-5.4, which may improve quality for certain image understanding use cases.

new_entries.title: Fixed image encoder bug in GPT-5.4
new_entries.summary: Updated the image encoder to fix a bug with input_image inputs in GPT-5.4, which may improve quality for certain image understanding use cases.

classified_changes.title: Fixed image encoder bug in GPT-5.4
classified_changes.impact: This is a new capability or improvement to the API.
classified_changes.action_required: No immediate action required. Optional to evaluate usage.
